shortDescription: 4-year MD · Basic science on Grand Cayman · US & Canada clinical rotations

policyAlert.summary: Verify current tuition, intake dates, and admission requirements on medicine.stmatthews.edu/ before quoting clients. Indian students: confirm NEET eligibility and NMC guidance separately.

alert.title: MD vs MBBS naming
alert.body: SMUSOM awards a Doctor of Medicine (MD) — counsel Indian clients on FMGE/NExT pathway; do not describe as Indian-style MBBS without explaining licensing steps.

about.label: Description
about.value: St. Matthew's University School of Medicine (SMUSOM) offers Doctor of Medicine (MD). Clinical medicine at affiliated US teaching hospitals; select elective rotation sites in Canada.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Meet SMUSOM admission requirements · English proficiency where required · Indian applicants: verify NEET eligibility with current NMC rules

about.label: Accreditation highlight
about.value: Accreditation Commission on Colleges of Medicine (ACCM) — verify current status on smusom site

about.label: Key authority
about.value: St. Matthew's University School of Medicine (admissions) · Cayman Islands immigration authorities for study permit / visa

about.label: After graduation
about.value: USMLE · NRMP residency match · FMGE/NExT for India practice · Verify licensing in target country

mbbs.institutionName: St. Matthew's University School of Medicine
accreditation: Accreditation Commission on Colleges of Medicine (ACCM) — verify current status on smusom site
Listed in World Directory of Medical Schools — verify WDOMS entry
US state approvals for clinical rotations — verify current list
mbbs.programDuration: 4 years (10 semesters): 5 basic science on Grand Cayman + 5 clinical in US/Canada
mbbs.clinicalTrainingNotes: Clinical medicine at affiliated US teaching hospitals; select elective rotation sites in Canada.
mbbs.campusNotes: Basic science campus on Grand Cayman. Caribbean living during first five semesters; clinical years relocate to rotation cities.

relatedPrograms.name: 4-Year MD Program
relatedPrograms.summary: Rolling admissions. Basic science on Grand Cayman; clinical rotations primarily in the US.

familyOptions.spouseCanAccompany: Possible subject to Cayman Islands dependant visa rules — verify current immigration policy before client commitment.
familyOptions.spouseWorkRights: Spouse work authorization varies by Cayman Islands rules — do not promise employment without visa approval.
familyOptions.childrenCanAccompany: Case-by-case — verify dependant visa rules and schooling availability.
familyOptions.childrenNotes: Plan schooling and childcare before family relocation.
familyOptions.additionalFundsRequired: Additional living funds and health insurance for each dependant — verify with admissions.
familyOptions.visaRoute: Student visa/residence for principal applicant; dependants require separate permits per Cayman Islands rules.
restrictions: Do not promise spouse work without visa approval
Verify all family immigration with official sources
Clinical years may require separate visa strategy (if applicable)

practicePathways.summary: Graduates of St. Matthew's University School of Medicine must verify licensing pathways in India (FMGE/NExT), host country, and any international targets on official sources.

india.fmgeNext: Indian citizens with foreign medical degrees must qualify FMGE (transitioning to NExT) and meet NMC requirements before registration in India.
details: Verify institution status on NMC foreign medical institutions list before enrollment.
Degree pathway: Doctor of Medicine (MD) — set client expectations early vs Indian 5.5-year MBBS.
Internship/clinical hours must meet NMC criteria — verify with current NMC notifications.
Never guarantee FMGE/NExT pass or India registration.

hostCountry.summary: Basic science in Grand Cayman; verify local student immigration rules during campus years.
details: Maintain valid student status in Cayman Islands during basic science semesters.
Clinical years primarily in the United States — separate US visa strategy required.

usCanada.summary: Graduates eligible for USMLE Step 1 & Step 2 CK; residency match via NRMP. Canadian elective sites may be available — verify on official graduate outcomes page.
details: Basic science on Grand Cayman → US clinical rotations → USMLE → NRMP Match.
MCAT may be required or strongly recommended — verify current admissions policy.
Residency placement statistics published on university site — quote published data only.

recognition.who: Verify World Directory of Medical Schools (WDOMS) listing and WFME recognition chain.
recognition.nmc: Counselors must verify current NMC eligible colleges list — status can change; check before each intake.

restrictions: Never guarantee licensure, residency match, or India registration
Verify NMC list at time of admission

documentChecklistSections.label: Admission documents
items: Official transcripts (10th, 12th, bachelor's / pre-med as required)
NEET scorecard (Indian applicants — if required under current NMC rules)
Passport copy — valid 6+ months beyond program

documentChecklistSections.label: Visa & immigration (Grand Cayman — basic science years)
items: Proof of tuition payment or financial guarantee
Student visa / permit for Cayman Islands

documentChecklistSections.label: US clinical years (additional)
items: US visa strategy documented (typically F-1 or as advised by university)
SEVIS / I-20 if applicable for US clinical portion
Health insurance for US clinical sites
Updated financial proof for US rotation city living costs

applicant.summary: During study in Cayman Islands, students must maintain valid student immigration status. Paid employment rules vary — verify local regulations before advising clients to work.
details: Unauthorized work may violate visa/residence conditions.
University may offer limited on-campus roles — verify with student services.
US clinical years governed by US student visa rules.
restrictions: Never advise clients to work illegally to fund tuition

spouse.summary: Spouse/partner work rights depend on Cayman Islands dependant visa conditions — verify before promising employment.
details: Plan finances assuming limited spouse income unless visa explicitly permits work.
restrictions: Do not promise spouse employment without visa approval

fullCostBreakdown.title: Full cost breakdown — St. Matthew's University School of Medicine
fullCostBreakdown.disclaimer: Indicative structure for counselor discussions. Tuition changes each academic year — always quote from https://medicine.stmatthews.edu/admissions/tuition-and-fees before client commitment.

totals.label: Indicative total program budget
totals.value: Calculate from official tuition + full program living costs
totals.notes: Use medicine.stmatthews.edu tuition page; add 15% buffer for currency and fee increases.

eligibility.criterion: NEET qualified (Indian applicants — verify current NMC rule)
eligibility.note: Check NMC notification at admission year

redFlagsBanner: If client expects guaranteed licensure or residency without exams, reset expectations before taking fees.
